# Visual Memory

Purpose: local-only project memory for accepted, rejected, and repeated visual directions.

Copy this template into `project/visual-memory.md` when a host project needs durable visual memory. Do not publish filled project-specific visual memory in reusable skill packages.

## Tried Directions

### Direction Entry

```text
date:
project/screen:
direction:
palette:
typography:
signature element:
result:
avoid repeating:
```
